package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for same_dependency_wired_in_multiple_bootstrap_locations: Duplicated construction of the same service or client in several startup files.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule156NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule156NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule156NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario156Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule156NegativeService, input Rule156NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
